name: LP - Get All Job Statuses and Usage

content.query:
SELECT
js.[OperatingCompany]
,[Active]
,js.[JobStatusID]
,[JobStatus]
,count(job.JobID) as JobCount
,[isBackLog]
,[isRestricted]
,js.[LP_JobStatusID]
FROM 
[EDW].[DIM_JOB_STATUS] js
left join [EDW].[FACT_JOB] job
on js.JobStatusID = job.JobStatusID
group BY
js.[OperatingCompany]
,[Active]
,js.[JobStatusID]
,[JobStatus]
,[isBackLog]
,[isRestricted]
,js.[LP_JobStatusID]
order BY
js.[OperatingCompany]
,[Active] desc
,JobCount desc
,js.[JobStatusID]
